LAW AND MOTION 302,PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT WILL ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST RESPONDENT PROPERTY U.S. CURRENCY AND DECLARE THE RESPONDENT PROPERTY FORFEITED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AND ORDER RESPONDENT PROPERTY DISTRIBUTED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. THE COURT WILL ENTER THE PROPOSED ORDER/JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS.ORDER/JUDGMENT IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Victoria Robinson, Jeffrey Ospital, And Maite Kvarna; Exhibits; (Proposed Order)
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Victoria Robinson, Jeffrey Ospital, And Maite Kvarna; Exhibits.

Petitioner People of the State of California's unopposed Motion For Default Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court will enter default judgment against Respondent Property U.S. Currency and declare the Respondent Property forfeited pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11470 et seq. and order respondent Property distributed pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11489. The court will enter the proposed order/judgment submitted with the moving papers.

Order/judgment is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
